job_stories.title: View Real-Time Model Metrics
job_stories.situation: I have AI models running in production
job_stories.motivation: monitor their health and catch issues before users do
job_stories.outcome: I can see live performance data and respond proactively

acceptance_criteria.then: I see latency (p50/p95/p99), error rate, and request count for each model

acceptance_criteria.given: I am viewing a latency chart
acceptance_criteria.when: I change the time range to '24h'
acceptance_criteria.then: The chart updates to show the last 24 hours of data

acceptance_criteria.given: I want to compare two models
acceptance_criteria.when: I select both models in the comparison view
acceptance_criteria.then: Their latency and error charts overlay on the same axes
Charts update smoothly without full page reload

job_stories.title: Configure Performance Alerts
job_stories.situation: I want to be notified when a model's latency exceeds acceptable levels
job_stories.motivation: respond to issues before they affect end users
job_stories.outcome: I get timely Slack/email notifications when thresholds are breached

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the Alerts page
acceptance_criteria.then: A form appears with metric selector, threshold input, comparison operator, and channel picker

acceptance_criteria.given: I have set a p95 latency threshold of 2000ms
acceptance_criteria.then: A horizontal line at 2000ms appears on the current latency chart
A notification is sent to the configured Slack channel within 60 seconds
I see the trigger timestamp, metric value, and threshold that was breached

job_stories.title: Analyze Cost and Budget
job_stories.situation: I manage the AI infrastructure budget
job_stories.motivation: understand spending patterns and prevent cost overruns
job_stories.outcome: I can track costs by model and get alerted before exceeding budget

acceptance_criteria.then: I see a breakdown of spending by model with daily and monthly totals
I see cost-per-request, total tokens, and spend trend for that model

acceptance_criteria.given: I have set a monthly budget of $5,000
acceptance_criteria.then: A budget alert is sent and the dashboard shows a warning banner
